design_philosophy.core_principle: Precision over Decoration. The interface is a drafting table—clean, structural, and invisible, allowing the user's report design to be the hero.

rules: Use 'Manrope' for all page titles, section headers, and the landing page.
Use 'Inter' for all UI controls (properties panel, inputs, tooltips) for maximum legibility.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for data values or formula inputs.
Labels should be uppercase and small (11px) to save space in dense panels.

primary.description: Royal Blue - Used for primary actions (Save, Export, Add Page).

secondary.description: Power BI Gold - Used ONLY for branding elements and identifying Power BI specific features.

grid_styles.properties_panel: flex flex-col gap-4 p-4 w-[280px] border-l bg-background
grid_styles.sidebar: w-[60px] md:w-[240px] border-r bg-background flex flex-col
grid_styles.canvas_area: flex-1 bg-gray-100/50 p-8 overflow-auto flex justify-center items-start

buttons.default: rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

inputs.default: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.label_style: text-xs font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 mb-1.5 block

dialogs.overlay: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=open]:fade-in-0
dialogs.content: fixed left-[50%] top-[50%] z-50 grid w-full max-w-lg translate-x-[-50%] translate-y-[-50%] gap-4 border bg-background p-6 shadow-lg duration-200 data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:zoom-out-95 data-[state=open]:zoom-in-95 sm:rounded-lg

drag_and_drop.draggable_item: cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:ring-2 hover:ring-primary/20 rounded border bg-white shadow-sm p-2 transition-all
drag_and_drop.drag_overlay: opacity-90 scale-105 shadow-xl rotate-2 cursor-grabbing border-primary border-2 z-[999]

power_bi_mockups.style: border border-gray-200 bg-white rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden
power_bi_mockups.placeholder_content: text-gray-300 flex items-center justify-center h-full w-full select-none

images.description: Abstract architectural white geometric shapes for Landing Page Hero Background
images.usage: Use as a subtle background for the landing page hero section with an overlay.

images.description: Abstract glowing blue data visualization ring
images.usage: Use for the side panel of the Login/Signup page to give a tech/data feel.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on light backgrounds is #4B5563 or darker.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-primary focus state.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for drag animations.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for buttons or cards. Keep them flat and clean.
Do NOT use rounded-full for buttons unless it's a specific 'pill' toggle.
Do NOT center-align the dashboard. It should be full-width.
Maintain a 'Drafting' feel: Precise lines, light backgrounds, high contrast text.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind with the custom colors (canvas, panel) and fonts (Manrope, Inter).
2. Create the Layout Shell first: Sidebar (Components), Topbar (Actions), Rightbar (Properties), Center (Canvas).
3. Implement the Canvas with a specific aspect ratio (16:9) container to simulate a Power BI report page.
4. Use Shadcn components for the properties panel inputs to save time.
5. For the Drag & Drop, ensure the 'ghost' image is clear so the user sees what they are dragging.
6. The 'Power BI Components' in the sidebar should be simple cards with an icon and a label.
